creator: chip.senkbeil@gmail.com
text:
The page in question: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/solid-state/kernel.html

The entry "options MD_ROOT" already exists in the generic kernel configuration. So, maybe make a note of that?

Fix: 

Ensure that the entry "options MD_ROOT" already exists in the generic kernel and, if so, make a note of that on the page? Probably further investigate what should be done for SSDs with 9.1-RELEASE.
How-To-Repeat: Visit the webpage.
